tools.name: D&D Beyond
tools.what: An official D&D digital toolset for character sheets, character building, rules lookup, leveling, spells, features, and equipment. It also has Maps VTT, but this table has not chosen it as the default tabletop.
tools.playersUse: Players may use it for sheets or rules if the DM chooses it. Do not assume it is required until the table decides.
tools.dmUse: The DM may use it for roster management, rules reference, or character review, but the map/VTT choice is separate.

tools.name: Discord
tools.what: The group voice and text space for game night, scheduling, announcements, recaps, and side questions.
tools.playersUse: Players use it for voice chat, session scheduling, between-session questions, and table community.
tools.dmUse: The DM uses it to run voice chat, post reminders, share recaps, and keep table communication in one place.

tools.name: Owlbear Rodeo
tools.what: A lightweight virtual tabletop, or VTT, for maps, tokens, movement, positioning, fog, and visual combat reference.
tools.playersUse: Players use it to see the scene, move their token when allowed, and understand where characters and enemies are.
tools.dmUse: The DM may choose it when the group wants a simple map layer without a heavier campaign platform.

tools.name: Roll20
tools.what: An optional heavier virtual tabletop with maps, tokens, sheets, dice, and campaign tools. Use it only if the campaign chooses Roll20.
tools.playersUse: Players can ignore Roll20 unless the DM says this campaign is using it.
tools.dmUse: The DM may choose it if the group wants a fuller VTT instead of a lightweight map tool.
